MASTER CALENDAR ON MAY-31-2022. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT TIMOTHY E. SCHMITZ SET FOR JUL-11-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-31-2022 -- APPEARANCES BY JULIE M. VANDERNOOR URNER, ESQ. (VIA COURTCALL) FOR PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.; TIMOTHY E. SCHMITZ, SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT (IN PERSON) - SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, PAYABLE BY JUL-11-2022, ARE IMPOSED ON PLAINTIFF'S ATTY. JULIE M. VANDERNOOR URNER AND SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT TIMOTHY E. SCHMITZ FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON JUL-11-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT STATED THAT SANCTIONS IMPOSED ARE GOING TO BE VACATED IF THE CASE SETTLES. DEFENDANT'S ORAL REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO PAY $60.00 AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE FOR THE CONTINUANCE FEE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE TO GET THE TRIAL DATE CONTINUED. TRIAL DATE IS NOW CONTINUED TO JUL-11-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. PLAINTIFF TO SEND NOTICE OF CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
